steps.t: Mizâdi is going ahead with Numûru and Sorkamâl. You should meet her outside of Ahâba, north-west of her small camp.
Someone is chasing the Beltáni shepherds in your direction! You should aid the shepherds.
The Beltáni shepherds you rescued asked you to enter Ahâba and speak to their chieftain. You should enter Ahâba and speak to Unusâli.
